zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Clisson於大約1363年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可可利頌時，她的父親Olivier V de Clisson28歲，母親Catherine de Montmorency-Laval38歲。她於1387年1月20日與Jean de Blois-Châtillon I在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安蒙可度爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1441年在她的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Clisson于大约1363年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可可利頌时，她的父亲Olivier V de Clisson28岁，母亲Catherine de Montmorency-Laval38岁。她于1387年1月20日与Jean de Blois-Châtillon I在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安蒙可度爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1441年在她的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clisson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a pet form of the personal name Closs, an old variant of Claus , a name of German and Flemish (Dutch) origin.

variants.name: Clawson
meanings: Americanized form of North German, Danish, and Norwegian Clausen , Claussen , or Klausen , and also of their Dutch cognates, such as Claassen or Klaassen, patronymics from short forms of the local equivalents of the personal name Nicholas . Compare Clauson .

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Clisson was born about 1363, in Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Olivier V de Clisson, was 28 and her mother, Catherine de Montmorency-Laval, was 38. She married Jean de Blois-Châtillon I on 20 January 1387, in Moncontour, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1441, in her hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Clisson est née environ 1363, à Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Olivier V de Clisson, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Montmorency-Laval, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Blois-Châtillon I le 20 janvier 1387, à Moncontour, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1441, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Clisson um 1363 in Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Olivier V de Clisson 28 und ihre Mutter Catherine de Montmorency-Laval 38. Sie hat am 20. Januar 1387 in Moncontour, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Jean de Blois-Châtillon I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1441 im Alter von 79 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Clissonが約1363年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティククリソンで生まれた時，父Olivier V de Clissonは28歳，母Catherine de Montmorency-Lavalは38歳であった。1387年1月20日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンモンコントウルでJean de Blois-Châtillon Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1441年に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Lo: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 클리슨
ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Clisson(이)가 대략 1363년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 클리슨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Olivier V de Clisson(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de Montmorency-Laval(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1387년 1월 20일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 몬콘토우르에서 Jean de Blois-Châtillon I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Clisson nasceu aproximadamente 1363, em Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Olivier V de Clisson, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Montmorency-Laval, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Blois-Châtillon I em 20 de janeiro de 1387, em Moncontour, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1441, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.Clisson, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Lo: клиссон, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Clisson родилась около 1363 г. в местности клиссон, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Olivier V de Clisson было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Montmorency-Laval, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Blois-Châtillon I 20 января 1387 г. в местности монконтоур, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1441 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

Se casó con Jean de Blois-Châtillon I el 20 de enero de 1387, en Moncontour, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
